description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two small, dark, elongated objects are visible near the center of the frame in the lower left quadrant. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B18
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a redacted still image derived from a U.S. military system to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025. The image, described as grainy and monochrome with a central crosshair, displays two small, dark, elongated objects. The operator reported being unable to positively identify the UAP, and no accompanying mission report was provided. The date displayed in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.
reported_object_description: Two small, dark, elongated objects visible near the center of the frame in the lower left quadrant.
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一张源自美国军事系统的经过编辑的静态图像。该图像被描述为颗粒状、单色，并带有中心十字线，显示两个小型、深色、细长物体。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP，且未提供随附任务报告。图像中显示的日期（12/31/99）因系统日期/时间未设置而有误。
reported_object_description_zh: 在画面中心附近左下象限可见两个小型、深色、细长物体。
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
claims: A UAP was observed via a U.S. military system.
The operator was unable to positively identify the UAP.
The image shows two small, dark, elongated objects.
claims_zh: 通过美国军事系统观测到一不明空中现象（UAP）。
操作员无法明确识别该UAP。
图像显示两个小型、深色、细长物体。
